{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230142266A57D335EEC9B93E4624"}"},"total":60},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7614820421562745625","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"逻辑缜密，设定也还不错，故事线有些出乎意料，没有什么硬伤，挺棒的。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772968188,"group_id":"7608543566272400408","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/oYskyOikAbBIb70O2VG+fVbwDS7zIr8pkzbAD8z4mI","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/99cb3a58a6d14d22aa42b7099f7aef9c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793140&x-signature=7kJCbvm3h7rW83ZGm%2FT6RlU06SU%3D","user_id":"2012549805248762","user_name":"宫老公老"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2012549805248762","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7608543566272400408","book_info":{"abstract":"评分刚开还在涨~
【全民求生】+【克苏鲁】+【无尽黑暗】+【庇护所升级】+【海克斯棱彩词条】+【杀伐果断】+【无敌流】+ 【迷宫饭】
一觉醒来，全球人类被投放到无尽黑暗的克苏鲁世界。
开局一座破草屋，一根仅能燃烧八小时的蜡烛。
别人小心翼翼，点燃蜡烛苟活，生怕引来黑暗中的不可名状。
沈夜看着自己的面板，冷冷一笑。
“理智会掉？”
每升一级庇护所，他有无限的天赋词条选择！
【利滚利（金）】= 每日资源自动结算利息，蜡烛、木材、食物，无穷无尽！
【金蛋 （棱彩）】= 三十天孵出金蛋，爆出堆积如山的传说遗物！
【恶魔契约（棱彩）】= 只要血条够长，万物皆可献祭。当别人还在担心墙壁被抓破，沈夜已经用生命值铸造出连不可名状都无法跨越的叹息之墙！
【升级咯！（棱彩）】=哪怕是一根蜡烛，强化+1000 也能照亮整个深渊！
当其他人为了一根蜡烛卑躬屈膝，甚至出卖一切时。
沈夜正坐在温暖的庇护所里，吃着用克苏鲁怪物做成的火锅，一边悠闲计算着今天的利息，一边聆听着屋外不可名状因无法靠近而发出的无能狂怒，淡淡道：
“你的呓语，有点吵到我数钱了。”
……
从【lv0破烂草屋】进化到【lv100永恒光明城】！
只要资源足够多，克苏鲁也能当灯泡！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o5f5fa2f8c9dfd6efb10bc1a15ba3b325~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"奈何江山","author_id":"","book_id":"7608543566272400408","book_name":"全民求生：克苏鲁成我火锅食材！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202028","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":515,"name":"末日求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=515&name=末日求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":372,"name":"网游","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=372&name=网游&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":705,"name":"克苏鲁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=705&name=克苏鲁&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":830,"name":"升级流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=830&name=升级流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7609762984444822040","read_count":"11550","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"182890"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.9","serial_count":"76","tags":"游戏体育,末日求生,网游,穿越,系统,求生,克苏鲁,升级流","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o5f5fa2f8c9dfd6efb10bc1a15ba3b325~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779385346&x-signature=nhr8SvaYOSgOzM8KBJDzRN74zCI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"672549664989444","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"97"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230142266A57D335EEC9B93E4624"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读11小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":28810,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":40986,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":1612},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7614752084295910168","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很不错,起码在番茄属于极佳的水平,比目前我看到的庇护所求生类的小说都好。 
剧情新颖,虽然依旧是从房子开始,但相较与其他套路升级作者写出了自己的路,包括房子逐渐发展变成领地进阶，感觉已经是城邦的雏形，低级庇护所在里面就像是城市的房产，写的很流畅。 
最最最重要的一点是这本书真的写出怪物的很多细节和生态和想法非常好,这点非常可贵,作者真的写出这个世界的特点而不是单纯套克苏鲁系列的模板。 
作者快快更新，看不够！","text_exts":[{"e":27,"s":24,"text":"庇护所","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%BA%87%E6%8A%A4%E6%89%80&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774201346B93E4624%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227614752084295910168%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227608543566272400408%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%BA%87%E6%8A%A4%E6%89%80%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":187,"s":184,"text":"克苏鲁","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%85%8B%E8%8B%8F%E9%B2%81&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774201346B93E4624%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227614752084295910168%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227608543566272400408%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%85%8B%E8%8B%8F%E9%B2%81%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772950794,"group_id":"7608543566272400408","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0LNwyuH69xPH66CQVX/dlY=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0298773bb52d4dfd9c85aa442ae7ec36~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792216&x-signature=bqCd3H8xkNGgRkMsZDPLgNUzlvs%3D","user_id":"244521868724387","user_name":"素菜江流"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"244521868724387","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"e
